summary: Annotate the live-network hand commands so the 4.28.0 synthesized-arg dogfood probes suit their design: pp:no-error-path-probe on lenient/best-guess commands (location resolve, earliest), pp:happy-args + a bare dry-run book Example so book's happy_path runs a safe no-op.
reason: location resolve intentionally resolves ambiguous input to a best guess (exit 0, no error path); earliest/book make live OpenTable/Tock/Resy calls. book defaults to dry-run unless TRG_ALLOW_BOOK=1, so the bare Example is a safe runnable happy-path. No behavior change — annotations only.
